entry.title: ABAWによりマイナス簿価
entry.content:
サポート　ご担当者　様

減損をして償却費計上をすると簿価がマイナスになる場合があります。

本来、償却費はメモ値の1円でストップするのが会計上(J-GAAP、IFRSなど)のリーガル要件と認識しております。

よろしくお願いいたします。

entry.title: MARA物料创建日期为2025年，但EBEWH表已存在2024年估价条目记录
entry.content: MARA物料创建日期为2025年，但EBEWH表已存在2024年估价条目记录

entry.title: WHT amount is not appearing for few of the invoices in FBL1N report
entry.content: WHT has been calculated for both highlighted line items. However, the report displays the WHT for only one of the line items. Could you please check why it is not appearing for the other line items.(The vendor code is same for all the line items).

entry.title: After Retirement asset is calculating Depreciation
entry.content:
We see after the retirement or scrapped the NBV value is positive and asset is charging depreciation on the following months.

Asset number : 2100000504 , 2100000425 

Company Code : PM00

Ideally after the Retirement this should not charge any depreciation.

entry.title: Error FZ 349: Vendor && is contained in proposal &&; no editin
entry.content:
Dear SAP

We reviewed OSS Note 1703252 (F110 - Error FZ 349: Vendor && is contained in proposal &&; no editing). The note says:   When run transaction F110 for a vendor/customer account, an entry in table REGUS is created to block the account. Once this entry is created, the vendor cannot be included in another payment proposal as the following error message appears: FZ 349:Vendor & & is contained in proposal & &; no editing.

Is there any setting that can be applied to transaction F110 so that the system does not block the vendor entirely, but instead blocks only specific line items?

 

Thanks in Advance

entry.title: Starting Nov 2026, Town Name and Country are conditional mandatory fields for Wire payments,
entry.content: Starting Nov 2026, Town Name and Country are conditional mandatory fields for Wire payments, meaning if address is provided, then “Town Name” and “Country” become mandatory fields, as attached the example to the case.

entry.title: A custom field was added to BSEG, but it cannot be edited in FB02 in S/4HANA.
entry.content: Why is the approach to adding custom fields to BSEG different between ECC and S/4HANA? . With the same configuration(OB32 ), editing is not possible in S/4HANA.

entry.title: Posting with trans. type [..] not possible as an acquis. was not yet posted
entry.content:
While uploading legacy asset with value through LTMC error"Posting with trans. type [..] not possible as an acquis. was not yet posted".

As per the template their is one template combine for legacy asset master creation and uploading the value.

Please suggest how to proceed. 

Attaching the template for reference.

LTMC project name - Akums_Asset_Final

entry.title: Message no. KD031 : Receiver categ. PSG is not allowed by settlement prof. ZIO004 for this sender
entry.content:
Hi Team,

We are trying to create a sales order but getting below error, 

Receiver categ. PSG is not allowed by settlement prof. ZIO004 for this sender

Please refer attached documentation for your reference.

Best Regards,

Praveen R

entry.title: User is not able to post the depreciation due to missing cost center in Asset master data.
entry.content:
User is not able to post the depreciation due to missing cost center in Asset master data 30000708 & 30000710.

in C01 /100 system, for company code 3806 Could you check and let us know you advise on this.

we have similar issue in C02/100 as well 30000667

Thank you

entry.title: Depreciation posting not completed due to missing Cost center in Asset Master
entry.content:
Hi Team,

Issue details: User created Asset with out Cost center. And posted acquisition And performed depreciation run Asset got posted depreciation but not in General ledger.

System C01/100, Company cod 3806, Asset No 30000708, COD-MIN

entry.title: Report 6PP1-001 does not contain any data pages
entry.content: "Report 6PP1-001 does not contain any data pages" while running the S_ALR_87013542 (Project System) report. For the Post Goods Issue posting, we are using movement type 281 Q with the cost center assigned as the account assignment object. Could this issue be related to the report output type, or is there another possible cause?  As requested by the business, could you confirm whether it is possible to display line items at the Cost Center level?

entry.title: Partnerbanktyp aus F-47 nicht im F110 Echtlauf
entry.content: Ich habe eine Buchung in der Transaktion F-47 erfasst, bei der der Partnerbanktyp gepflegt wurde, aber dieser wird nicht an die Transaktion F110 im Echtlauf übergeben. Ich möchte wissen, warum der Partnerbanktyp nicht automatisch in den Zahlungsbeleg übernommen wird und welche Einstellungen oder Anpassungen erforderlich sind, um dieses Problem zu beheben. Im F110 Vorschlagslauf im Protokoll ist der Partnerbanktyp richtig aufgeführt.

entry.title: Asset planed deprecation Issue
entry.content:
Dear Team,

The business posted asset adjustment entries on 31-Dec-2025 for the following three assets:

  • 247000009
  • 247000008
  • 247000000

However, planned depreciation is being generated only for Asset 247000009. For the other two assets (247000008 and 247000000), planned depreciation is not being displayed

entry.title: Planed Deprecation Issue
entry.content: Asset planed Deprecation

entry.title: Report 6PP1-001 does not contain any data pages
entry.content: "Report 6PP1-001 does not contain any data pages" while running the S_ALR_87013542 (Project System) report. For the Post Goods Issue posting, we are using movement type 281 Q with the cost center assigned as the account assignment object. Could this issue be related to the report output type, or is there another possible cause?  As requested by the business, could you confirm whether it is possible to display line items at the Cost Center level?

entry.title: Transaction code F.61, decimal notation PDF form
entry.content: User is running Correspondence via transaction codes FB12, Correspondence SAP19 Customer Invoice, and F.61 for Trigger correspondence. User is running for Company code US02 (country US), decimal notation in SU3 xxx,xxx.00. however the correspondence for Customer from Porto Rico is xxx.xxx,00. We are trying to debug and trace the behavior to find the tables and configuration related the decimal notation for Form PDF. We can see that the decimal notation per country is in table T005X and T005 however we cannot find this table in trace nor debug. Which table the program is considering for this decimal notation?  Kindly share your analysis related.

entry.title: Asset not fully depreciating with Dep to day approach in SAp
entry.content: We created Dep Keys by selecting the 'Deo to day' checkbox for both straightline and Multi level percent Dep Key. But the Assets the Assets are not fully depreciated after the useful life. Please check. Allow us to create an SAP incident as we already asked in SAP Community but no response. Thanks

entry.title: Customer Number Not Displayed for Certain Documents in FBL5N – Customer Line-Item Display
entry.content:
Dear SAP Support Team,

We are experiencing an issue in Transaction FBL5N (Customer Line Item Display) where the Customer Number field is not populated for a few accounting documents, although the documents are displayed under the respective customer account.

Observed Behavior

  • In FBL5N output, some line items show a blank Customer Number field.
  • Other line items for the same customer display the Customer Number correctly.
  • As shown in the attached file, customer numbers such as 902500 and 901400 are displayed for some records, while several other records belonging to the same customer appear with a blank Customer Number field.

entry.title: FBL1N mass block
entry.content:
Hi Team,

We are trying to apply Payment block through FBL1N mass feature, but due to baseline date is not editable system is not allowing it.

 

Please find attached Document for detailed steps.
